name: Hyrlo
description: 4 HP three-channel stereo audio mixer. Each channel is a stereo pair with L normalled to R for mono use; 3 stereo / 6 mono configurations via jack insertion. Daisy-chainable to neighbours for bigger buses.

controls.name: Level knob CH 1
controls.description: Volume for channel 1. Natural audio taper. Mutes fully at CCW. Stereo pair collapses to mono when only L is patched.
controls.detail: audio taper · 0 to unity · L normalled to R

controls.name: Level knob CH 2
controls.description: Volume for channel 2. Same taper as CH 1. Independent stereo/mono behaviour per channel.
controls.detail: audio taper · 0 to unity · L normalled to R

controls.name: Level knob CH 3
controls.description: Volume for channel 3. Same taper as CH 1. Bottom-most channel in daisy-chain order.
controls.detail: audio taper · 0 to unity · L normalled to R

inputs.name: CH 1 L / R
inputs.description: Stereo pair input for channel 1. Patch only L for mono; R follows L. Patch both for true stereo source.

inputs.name: CH 2 L / R
inputs.description: Stereo pair input for channel 2. Normalling identical to CH 1.

inputs.name: CH 3 L / R
inputs.description: Stereo pair input for channel 3. Normalling identical to CH 1.

inputs.name: CHAIN IN L / R
inputs.description: Daisy-chain input. Sums an upstream Hyrlo/Ferry bus into this module's output. Bypassed (disconnected from mix) if a jack is inserted at the corresponding chain output.

outputs.name: OUT L / R
outputs.description: Main stereo mix of CH 1-3 plus CHAIN IN. Transparent low-noise summing.

behaviors.name: L → R mono normalling
behaviors.description: Each channel's L input normals to R. A mono cable in L sends the same signal to both sides of the stereo bus, keeping the channel centred. Patching R breaks the normal and opens true stereo.

behaviors.name: Daisy chain
behaviors.trigger: patch cable between two Hyrlo modules
behaviors.description: Hyrlo's OUT can feed the next unit's CHAIN IN, building a 6-, 9-, 12-channel stereo bus. Daisy links are interrupted when a jack is physically inserted at the chain output, allowing sub-mix taps.

behaviors.name: Flip panel
behaviors.description: Symmetrical layout lets the user mount the panel flipped. Jacks and pots still align; cosmetic variant only. No signal-path changes.

behaviors.name: AC-coupled audio path
behaviors.description: All inputs are AC-coupled, so CV cannot pass through. Blocks DC offsets but means Hyrlo cannot mix control voltages cleanly — use a dedicated CV mixer for those.

patchIdeas.name: Three-voice stereo submix
patchIdeas.patch: Three stereo voices into CH 1-3 · main OUT → outboard · Hyrlo's short signal path keeps transients intact
patchIdeas.diagram:
Hyrlo:

Voice 1:

Voice 2:

Voice 3:

- Voice 1 (Out L) -> Hyrlo (CH 1 L)
- Voice 1 (Out R) -> Hyrlo (CH 1 R)
- Voice 2 (Out L) -> Hyrlo (CH 2 L)
- Voice 2 (Out R) -> Hyrlo (CH 2 R)
- Voice 3 (Out L) -> Hyrlo (CH 3 L)
- Voice 3 (Out R) -> Hyrlo (CH 3 R)
- Hyrlo (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Hyrlo (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Six-mono mix
patchIdeas.patch: Patch only L jacks on CH 1-3 (3 mono sources) · add second Hyrlo via CHAIN for 3 more mono channels · drums + bass + pads in one skiff
patchIdeas.diagram:
Hyrlo A:

Hyrlo B:

- Kick (Out) -> Hyrlo A (CH 1 L)
- Snare (Out) -> Hyrlo A (CH 2 L)
- HiHat (Out) -> Hyrlo A (CH 3 L)
- Bass (Out) -> Hyrlo B (CH 1 L)
- Pad (Out) -> Hyrlo B (CH 2 L)
- Lead (Out) -> Hyrlo B (CH 3 L)
- Hyrlo B (OUT L) -> Hyrlo A (CHAIN IN L)
- Hyrlo B (OUT R) -> Hyrlo A (CHAIN IN R)
- Hyrlo A (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Hyrlo A (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Pre-FX / post-FX parallel
patchIdeas.patch: CH 1 = dry voice · CH 2 = reverb return · CH 3 = delay return · blend wet/dry on front panel · stereo pair on returns for true stereo FX
patchIdeas.diagram:
Hyrlo:

Reverb:

Delay:

- Voice (Out) -> Hyrlo (CH 1 L)
- Voice (Out) -> Reverb (In)
- Reverb (Out L) -> Hyrlo (CH 2 L)
- Reverb (Out R) -> Hyrlo (CH 2 R)
- Voice (Out) -> Delay (In)
- Delay (Out L) -> Hyrlo (CH 3 L)
- Delay (Out R) -> Hyrlo (CH 3 R)
- Hyrlo (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Hyrlo (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Chain-tap sub-bus
patchIdeas.patch: Drum submix on Hyrlo A → CHAIN → Hyrlo B · insert a jack at Hyrlo A OUT L/R breaks the chain to send drums to a compressor before re-entering Hyrlo B's chain
patchIdeas.diagram:
Hyrlo A:
* Drum submix

Hyrlo B:
* Master

Compressor:

- Kick (Out) -> Hyrlo A (CH 1 L)
- Snare (Out) -> Hyrlo A (CH 2 L)
- HiHat (Out) -> Hyrlo A (CH 3 L)
- Hyrlo A (OUT L) -> Compressor (In L) // chain broken by jack
- Hyrlo A (OUT R) -> Compressor (In R)
- Compressor (Out L) -> Hyrlo B (CHAIN IN L)
- Compressor (Out R) -> Hyrlo B (CHAIN IN R)
- Hyrlo B (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Hyrlo B (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo + two mono
patchIdeas.patch: CH 1 stereo synth (both L/R patched) · CH 2/3 mono drum machines (L only, auto-centred) · one 4 HP mixer handles the whole jam
patchIdeas.diagram:
Hyrlo:

Stereo Synth:

- Stereo Synth (Out L) -> Hyrlo (CH 1 L)
- Stereo Synth (Out R) -> Hyrlo (CH 1 R)
- Drum 1 (Out) -> Hyrlo (CH 2 L) // mono → centred
- Drum 2 (Out) -> Hyrlo (CH 3 L) // mono → centred
- Hyrlo (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Hyrlo (OUT R) -> Output (R)
